properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I offer up this rebel heart So stubborn and so restless from the start I don't wanna fight You anymore So take this rebel heart and make it Yours

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Father, I no longer wanna run You've broken my resistance with Your love And drowned it underneath the crimson spill So bend this rebel heart unto Your will

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I give it over to You I give it over to You Your love is like an arrow, straight and true And now this rebel heart belongs to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Help me lay the renegade to rest Turn the stone inside me back to flesh And hold me'til my best defenses fall And watch this rebel heart surrender all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, take my life and let it be Yours Oh, take my life and let it be Yours Oh, take my life and let it be Yours Oh, take my life and let it be Yours

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now this rebel heart belongs to You Now this rebel heart belongs to You
